title: Monetary policy decisions
summary: This is a navigation/listing page on the ECB website that describes where to find monetary policy decisions, not an actual policy decision itself. The page states that ECB monetary policy decisions are published in press releases at 14:15 CET on the day of Governing Council meetings, and that statements, transcripts, and Q&A materials are available. No specific policy content, dates, or decisions are present in this source.
key_points: This is a navigation/listing page, not an actual monetary policy decision document
ECB monetary policy decisions are published at 14:15 CET on the day of the Governing Council meeting
Statements, transcripts of Q&A, and monetary policy accounts are available for each meeting
The actual decisions would be found by following links from this index page
why_it_matters: This page serves as an index or directory to ECB monetary policy decisions but contains no actual policy content itself. It cannot be used as a source for specific ECB policy actions, rate decisions, or forward guidance.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page as correctly identified in the record - violates Rule 5 (reject if homepage, navigation, listing, or search page)
Source contains no actual monetary policy content - only describes where to find decisions
No published_at date because no specific meeting is referenced
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' but this indicates no valid event to categorize
No archival value - this is structural metadata describing an index, not a research document

notes: Non-archiveable listing page. Contains no specific ECB policy content, only metadata about where to find decisions. Would need to crawl actual decision pages (e.g., specific rate decision press releases) for substantive research content.

reasoning: Cannot serve as source for any specific monetary policy action
